task: On https://books.toscrape.com, open the Poetry category. Identify every book rated exactly FIVE stars (the star rating shown on each book card), list their titles, and report the combined total price of those five-star books in pounds.

attempts.claimed_answer:
On the Poetry category page at https://books.toscrape.com, I found 9 books rated exactly FIVE stars:

1. **Slow States of Collapse** (Elizabeth Best) - £57.31
2. **Untitled Collection: Sabbath Poems** (Wendell Berry) - £14.27
3. **Poems That Make Grown Women Cry** - £14.19
4. **Quarter Life Poetry: Poems** - £50.89
5. **Out of Print: City** - £53.64
6. **Les Fleurs du Mal** - £29.04
7. **Leave This Song Behind** - £51.17
8. **The Collected Poems of W.B. Yeats** - £15.42
9. **Booked** (Elizabeth Acevedo) - £17.49

**Combined total price: £303.42**

checked_claims.claim: 9 books rated exactly FIVE stars found in Poetry category
checked_claims.observed: Only 6 books rated exactly FIVE stars found in Poetry category
Combined total price of five-star books: £217.65 (6 books at £50.89+£53.64+£29.04+£51.17+£15.42+£17.49)

checked_claims.claim: Slow States of Collapse - £57.31 is a five-star book
checked_claims.observed: Slow States of Collapse has 4 stars (not 5), priced at £57.31

checked_claims.claim: Untitled Collection: Sabbath Poems - £14.27 is a five-star book
checked_claims.observed: Untitled Collection: Sabbath Poems has 4 stars (not 5), priced at £14.27

checked_claims.claim: Poems That Make Grown Women Cry - £14.19 is a five-star book
checked_claims.observed: Poems That Make Grown Women Cry has 4 stars (not 5), priced at £14.19

verdict.divergence: Executor incorrectly counted 3 books with 4-star ratings as 5-star books, inflating the count from 6 to 9 and the total from £217.65 to £303.42.
verdict.diagnosis: Verify star ratings visually on each book card before including in the five-star count; do not include books with 4-star ratings in the five-star total.

verdict.divergence: Agent incorrectly identified three 4-star books (Slow States of Collapse, Untitled Collection: Sabbath Poems, Poems That Make Grown Women Cry) as 5-star books, resulting in wrong count (9 vs 6) and wrong total (£303.42 vs £217.65).
verdict.diagnosis: Re-examine star ratings on each book card before including in the five-star count; do not assume star ratings from book titles or positions in the list.

verdict.divergence: Executor incorrectly identified 9 five-star books totaling £303.42, but only 7 books have 5-star ratings totaling £231.84; two claimed books (Slow States of Collapse and Untitled Collection: Sabbath Poems) actually have 4 stars each.
verdict.diagnosis: Re-examine star ratings carefully before including books in the count; verify each book's star rating by viewing the full star icon display on the category page, not just assuming from partial views.
